errors: The certified 198-row atomic register is not yet loaded; downloaded forms and OCR remain review-only.
Candidate legal names and Form 35A row order remain subject to final source verification.
reference.register_source: Certified 2025 Malava polling-stream register pending; portal Form 35A assignments are used only to bootstrap OCR validation.
reference.candidate_source: Publicly reported leading Malava candidates; the complete legal candidate list and ballot order remain pending source verification.

blocs.note: Historical arithmetic aggregation only. It does not imply transferability between parties.

official_declaration.winner_source: Public reports identify David Athman Ndakwa as the Malava by-election winner; official Form 35B candidate totals are not loaded in this benchmark profile.
official_declaration.runner_up_source: Public reports identify Seth Panyako as the principal challenger.
notes: This profile is an OCR validation benchmark, not a publishable constituency tally.
Only three publicly reported candidate names are configured initially. Candidate totals and V01 remain non-authoritative until the complete legal candidate list and ballot order are source-verified.

archive.methodology_note: Malava's 198 published Form 35A assignments are used as a large handwritten-digit OCR benchmark. Portal-bootstrap rows remain review-only until the certified register and complete candidate roster are loaded.

ocr.note: OCR output is a pre-fill only. Handwritten cells are read with layout anchors and arithmetic reconciliation, but no historical stream is added to the public tally until human review and statutory validation are complete.

portal_sync.message: New or changed IEBC forms were downloaded and the dashboard was rebuilt.
